"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.TargetNames = void 0; const TargetNames = exports.TargetNames = { node: "node", deno: "deno", chrome: "chrome", opera: "opera", edge: "edge", firefox: "firefox", safari: "safari", ie: "ie", ios: "ios", android: "android", electron: "electron", samsung: "samsung", rhino: "rhino", opera_mobile: "opera_mobile" }; //# sourceMappingURL=options.js.map
